feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Create a Custom field in a business context and map data to it from a field in CDS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to create a custom field in the Pricing (SD_PRICECOMHEAD) Business context in public cloud and then to get 'Account group' field data from the CDS view I_CustomerAccountGroup into the new custom field.

Is it possible to create a custom field in a business context and then link it to a Standard field from a CDS view to capture its data.

Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Issue with Determining Current Day of the Week in CDS View Calculation Field
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In S/4 Hana public cloud system,

In Extensibility (not in BADI):  

In one of our CDS view developments, we needed to determine the current day of the week in numeric format (e.g., Monday = 1, Tuesday = 2, etc.). I checked the available functions in the calculation field but couldn't find any that directly provide this value.

We attempted the following logic, but it doesn't yield accurate results:

 

 
MOD(DATS_DAYS_BETWEEN(CAST(CONCAT(SUBSTRING($session.system_date, 1, 4), '0101') AS ABAP.DATS), $session.system_date), 7) + 1
Example:  MOD("20240101", $session.system_date), 7) + 1  - Giving the accurate day like Monday as  - 1  
But   MOD("20250101", $session.system_date), 7) + 1 -Giving the wrong day  Monday as  - 6
The above logic i am using the dynamic year.
 
Regards,
A.Saikrishna

entry.title: Issue with Email Notification Link for background job in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
• In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, after configuring the situation template for background job notifications, the email notification is received but the navigation link within the email does not work.
  • Upon clicking the link in the email notification, the error "App could not be opened either due to an incorrect configuration or a missing role assignment" is displayed.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Need APIs for Automating Finance Data Uploads (No Manual Entry)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for our client, and the business has a strict requirement for automated data uploads in the Finance module — they do not accept manual entries for the scenarios listed below.

We explored available options like Migration Cockpit, SOAP/REST APIs, and standard CDS views, but we could not identify suitable APIs or methods for the following requirements.

Module Business Requirement Current Situation Our Consulting Concern
FinanceVendor invoice uploadManual entry via FIORINo API found; how to upload invoices automatically when HSN Code is missing?
FinanceCustomer invoice uploadManual entry via FIORIIs there an API or method to upload customer invoices without HSN Code?
FinanceCustomer to Customer transfer postingManualCan this be automated using Migration Cockpit or an API in Public Cloud?
FinanceVendor to Vendor transfer postingManualAny way to automate via standard APIs in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
FinanceGL Account creationManual copyCan GL master data be created via API/Migration Object in Public Cloud?
FinanceDepreciation Key creationManual configHow can we create a new depreciation key (different rate) via automated process or API?
FinanceGL Line Item ChangeManualIs there a way to update GL line items automatically (via API or standard FIORI)?
FinanceDelivery Report UploadNot supportedIs there a way to upload delivery-related reports or data in Public Cloud?

➤ Our Expectations:

  • API endpoints (if available) to handle these operations

  • Workarounds or alternative integration strategies (e.g., iRPA, SAP BTP, Integration Suite)

  • Guidance on best practices for Public Cloud automation (data load without user intervention)

Any documentation, API hub links, or practical insights from similar implementations would be very helpful.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Need APIs for Automating Finance Data Uploads (No Manual Entry)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for our client, and there is a critical business requirement to automate all Finance-related data uploads — manual entry is not acceptable.

We have explored tools like Migration Cockpit, checked standard APIs, and searched the SAP API Business Hub, but we couldn’t identify suitable APIs or automated solutions for the below scenarios:

Module Business Requirement Current Situation Our Consulting Concern
FinanceVendor invoice uploadManual via FioriNo suitable API found – how can we upload invoices when HSN Code is missing?
FinanceCustomer invoice uploadManual via FioriAny API or method for upload without HSN Code?
FinanceCustomer to Customer transfer postingManualCan this be automated using Migration Cockpit or APIs?
FinanceVendor to Vendor transfer postingManualAny way to automate through API or integration tool?
FinanceGL Account creationManual copyIs it possible to create GL accounts using APIs or Migration Cockpit?
FinanceDepreciation Key creationManual configCan we create custom depreciation keys with new rates automatically?
FinanceGL Line Item ChangeManualIs there any standard API or method to update GL line items in Public Cloud?
FinanceDelivery Report UploadNot supportedCan delivery reports or related data be uploaded in Public Cloud? If yes, how?

➤ Our Objective:

To identify SAP-supported APIs or integration methods for handling these activities in fully automated mode (no user interaction). Any insights into:

  • API endpoints

  • iRPA / SAP BTP Integration Suite options

  • Workarounds or standard best practices are appreciated.

We welcome any relevant links, documentation, or expert suggestions.

entry.title: Backflush Components Not Appearing in Pick List Form
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I've noticed that components set to backflush are not appearing in the Pick List form.
Is this the expected behavior, or could there be a configuration I'm missing?

Thanks in advance for your insights!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP system startup FMA
entry.content:
SAP Public Cloud Edition How to Enable MFA for Multiple Authentication at Login
For example, if I want to log in, I need a mobile phone verification code.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 收入認列錯誤
entry.content:
HI SAP

我看目前的收入確認碼的文檔介紹都是將在開立客戶發票的時候就會直接認列收入科目，

但我認知的收入確認應該是要在開發票的時候先認遞延收入，等到月底進行收入確認運行時再根據比例將遞延收入轉出到實際收入科目，這樣才有符合收入確認的用意。

現在的文檔內容都是將收入確認及應計收入對沖，但實際的開票認列的收入科目不會有後續轉換的動作，想再詢問各位老師有沒有什麼解決方案?

entry.title: Quality Custom field data flow in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I am new to Public Cloud so need you help and support

There is one requirement from our customer actually they want to record a value as Quality Heat Number while doing the Usage decision and flow that value in either Stock - Multiple materials app or MMBE. So what we decided to publish a Custom field in Usage Decision and record value over there. So i need help in how to flow this custom field value in the apps i have mentioned above or if there any other solution please let me know or it can be achieved through any Business Context, Please tell me its very Urgent.

Raj

entry.title: Quality Heat Number Flow in Public Cloud
entry.content:
I am new to Public Cloud so need you help and support

There is one requirement from our customer actually they want to record a value as Quality Heat Number while doing the Usage decision and flow that value in either Multiple Stock app or MMBE. So what we decided to publish a Custom field in Usage Decision and record value over there. So i need help in how to flow this custom field value in the apps i have mentioned above or if there any other solution please let me know or it can be achieved through any Business Context, Please tell me its very Urgent.

Raj

entry.title: Create Purchase Order - Advanced Down Payment Check
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to check down payment % before saving. But in custom logic app, i couldn't find any down payment field in Badi's.

entry.title: Information on User, Role and App ID detail
entry.content:
Dear Team,


Kindly provide details on how we can get only active user details with roles and tiles assigned to the users and the roles in one consolidated excel sheet. As we checked from the IAM Information System app we are unable to get only active users details, it is providing all the users details in excel sheet and it is also not formatted in proper manner.


Kindly guide me in a proper way on how I can get these details in a single consolidated excel sheet. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to track pallets across goods movements, deliveries, and production in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edit
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

One of our customers needs to keep track of pallets throughout the supply chain — from goods receipt and  to production and outbound deliveries — using SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

Has anyone implemented pallet tracking successfully in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
What configuration or workaround did you use?
Any tips or best practices would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Edit journal entry when processor approval Verify General Journal Entries
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Since T-code FBV0 can no longer be used in the public cloud, we are now using the app 'Verify General Journal Entries For Requester' to submit journal entries, which are then approved and posted by the processor.

Currently, the client requests that, similar to T-code FBV0, journal entries can be manually modified during the processor review before posting. Could you suggest how to configure in the public cloud to allow the functionality where parked journal entries can be modified before posting, as was possible with FBV0 in the previous HANA version? Thank you so much.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Automating S/4HANA Cloud UI Deployment via CI/CD Pipeline
entry.content:
I'm currently developing an OnStack Extension on the S/4HANA Public Cloud. This includes a UI generated using SAP Fiori Elements. The development takes place in VSCode. For deployment to the S/4HANA Cloud, the @SAP/ux-ui5-tooling npm package is used, specifically the command fiori deploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml.

The current ui5-deploy.yaml looks as follows:

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: xxx
type: application
builder:
  customTasks:
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-task
      afterTask: replaceVersion
      configuration:
        debug: true
        transformModulesToUI5:
          overridesToOverride: true
    - name: deploy-to-abap
      afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
      configuration:
        target:
          url: xxx
          authenticationType: reentranceTicket
        app:
          name: xxx
          description: xxx
          package: xxx
          transport: xxx
        exclude:
          - /test/
          - /*.ts
  resources:
    excludes:
      - /test/**
      - /localService/**

This means that the deployment is currently executed in the user context using a reentrance ticket. Now, I want to automate the deployment via a CI/CD pipeline (either Azure DevOps or SAP CI/CD Service).

The challenge is that a reentrance ticket cannot be generated in an automated context. My idea was to use a technical user, but I couldn’t find a suitable Communication Scenario that would support this kind of deployment.

What would be the best way to accomplish this?

entry.title: Automatically Closing of credit desicions in SAP
entry.content:
We have credit decesions in productiv system, which were closed automatically by workflow User but we do not know why. 

What are the rules behind? Can anyone help me with this topic?

Thanks and greetings

Franziska

entry.title: Access to your data in S/4HANA Cloud Public edition after end of contract
entry.content:
I have a customer that is currently on a 2-system landscape, and wants to re-implement on a 3-system landscape with a new contract. This means that they will close the contract of the 2-system landscape of S/4HANA Cloud Public. 

The customer has the requirement to have their data accessible for audit purposes at least for the next couple of years. What tools or what does SAP offer for these customers, how to store or get access to their data?

entry.title: Custom fields are not visible in screen maintain business partner.
entry.content:
Unable to Add Custom fields in the Maintain Business Partner App


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not displayed on output
entry.content:
Dear Expert Community,

I have an Adobe output form (DEBIT MEMO) in S4Hana public cloud where I have added a field. The field is visible/invisible on the printout as expected, but the hardcoded value of the field remains empty / doesn't display. The caption of the field is correctly displayed (or not) as prompted by the conditions, proving that the active/inactive conditions work correctly. Just the value of the field doesn't get displayed.

The active/inactive condition of this field, as well as the hardcoded value, are controlled by a piece of java code as shown below (in the below, the real Partner number is replaced by XXXXXX):

<script contentType="application/x-javascript">if(this.parent.Partner.rawValue =="XXXXXX") {this.rawValue =="TEST"}; else
{
this.presence = "inactive";
}
</script>

What could be the reason and what could be done? 

Best regards,

Katja

entry.title: purchase order formsediting or making changes
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to know is there any possibility of changing the layouts to existing PO forms I got to know it can be done via adobe life cycle designer as I am new, I would like to explore more about it .is there any tutorial or links that can be referred to do some testing's by myself.
